vendor_capabilities.title: Core Services Offered by LabCorp Central Labs
vendor_capabilities.summary: Labcorp Central Labs provides a range of services including specialty and safety testing, kit production, pre-analytical services, and specimen management.
facts: Labcorp Central Labs offers specialty and safety testing, kit production, pre-analytical services, and specimen management.
They provide short- and long-term storage options for samples ranging from ambient temperature to -150°C.
Labcorp has 35 years of experience in clinical trial lab testing.

vendor_capabilities.title: Comprehensive Clinical Trial Testing Solutions
vendor_capabilities.summary: Labcorp provides comprehensive clinical trial testing solutions, including anatomic pathology, bioanalysis, CMC analytics, genetics, genomics, and flow cytometry.
facts: Labcorp offers services in anatomic pathology, bioanalysis, CMC analytics, genetics, genomics, and flow cytometry.
They support precision medicine development through comprehensive clinical trial testing solutions.

vendor_capabilities.title: Global Trial Connect for Clinical Trials
vendor_capabilities.summary: Labcorp's Global Trial Connect enhances the investigator workflow and patient experience, aiming to expedite clinical trials.
facts: Global Trial Connect simplifies the investigator workflow and improves patient experience.
Labcorp offers 24/7 site support and tools to enhance study start-up efficiencies.

vendor_capabilities.title: Biomarker-driven Clinical Trials
vendor_capabilities.summary: Labcorp partners with biopharma innovators to design biomarker-driven strategies for clinical trials, providing customized solutions and expertise across various therapeutic areas.
facts: Labcorp collaborates with biopharma innovators to design biomarker-driven strategies for clinical trials.
They offer customized solutions and expertise in various therapeutic areas.

vendor_capabilities.title: Global Presence and Infrastructure
vendor_capabilities.summary: LabCorp operates five integrated central labs located in key global locations, supporting over 5,000 clinical trials in more than 100 countries.
facts: LabCorp has five integrated central labs in Indianapolis (USA), Geneva (Switzerland), Singapore, Shanghai (China), and Kawagoe City (Japan).
These labs support over 5,000 clinical trials across more than 100 countries.

vendor_capabilities.title: Global Reach and Scale
vendor_capabilities.summary: LabCorp operates in approximately 100 countries and processes over 700 million tests annually, providing significant economies of scale.
facts: LabCorp operates in roughly 100 countries.
Processes over 700 million tests annually.

vendor_positive_news.title: Labcorp agrees to acquire select Parkview Health lab assets
vendor_positive_news.summary: Labcorp has entered a strategic agreement to acquire select outreach lab assets from Parkview Health, with the transaction expected to close in 2026. This acquisition will enhance Labcorp's provision of non-emergent lab services to Parkview patients.
facts: Labcorp agreed to acquire select outreach lab assets from Parkview Health.
The transaction is expected to close in 2026.
Labcorp will provide non-emergent lab services to Parkview patients.

vendor_positive_news.title: Labcorp Introduces AI-Powered Real-World Data Platform with AWS and Datavant to Accelerate Alzheimer's Research
vendor_positive_news.summary: In April 2026, Labcorp launched an AI-powered real-world data platform in collaboration with Amazon Web Services and Datavant. This platform aims to provide rapid insights into Alzheimer's disease and will expand to include other health indications.
facts: Labcorp launched an AI-powered real-world data platform in partnership with AWS and Datavant.
The platform is designed to provide rapid insights into Alzheimer's disease and will later include inflammatory diseases, cardiometabolic conditions, women's health, and oncology.
The platform will complete its initial validation phase in spring 2026.

vendor_positive_news.title: Labcorp Achieves IVDR CE-Marking for PGDx elio™ tissue complete in the EU - BioSpace
vendor_positive_news.summary: In July 2025, Labcorp was recognized for achieving IVDR CE-marking for its PGDx elio™ Tissue Complete assay in the European Union. This recognition underscores Labcorp's commitment to advancing personalized cancer-care diagnostics.
facts: Labcorp attained IVDR CE-marking for its PGDx elio™ Tissue Complete assay in July 2025.
This achievement highlights Labcorp's progress in delivering personalized cancer-care diagnostics.

vendor_positive_news.title: Labcorp Achieves IVDR CE-Marking for PGDx elio™ tissue complete in the EU
vendor_positive_news.summary: In July 2025, LabCorp announced that its PGDx elio™ tissue complete test received IVDR CE-marking in the EU, making it the first and only comprehensive solid-tumor profiling assay approved under the new EU regulations. This approval significantly expands access to personalized cancer care for patients in the EU.
facts: LabCorp's PGDx elio™ tissue complete test received IVDR CE-marking in July 2025.
It is the first and only comprehensive solid-tumor profiling assay approved under the new EU regulations.
The approval expands access to personalized cancer care for approximately 2.7 million people diagnosed with cancer annually in the EU.

vendor_positive_news.title: Labcorp raises annual profit forecast on strong diagnostic testing demand - Reuters
vendor_positive_news.summary: Labcorp raised its 2025 adjusted profit forecast to between $16.05 and $16.50 per share, driven by strong performance in its diagnostic lab and contract research segments.
facts: Labcorp raised its 2025 adjusted profit forecast to $16.05-$16.50 per share.
The company reported quarterly revenue of $3.53 billion, with an 8.9% increase in its diagnostic lab unit and an 11% increase in its contract research business.

vendor_positive_news.title: Labcorp to Announce First Quarter Financial Results on April 30, 2026 - lincolnjournal.com
vendor_positive_news.summary: Labcorp supported over 85% of new drugs and therapeutic products approved by the FDA in 2025 and performed over 750 million tests worldwide, showcasing its significant role in patient care and drug development.
facts: Labcorp supported more than 85% of new drugs and therapeutic products approved by the FDA in 2025.
Labcorp performed over 750 million laboratory tests worldwide in 2025.

vendor_negative_news.title: Labcorp (NYSE:LH) Misses Q4 CY2025 Sales Expectations
vendor_negative_news.summary: Labcorp's Q4 CY2025 results showed a decline in earnings per share by 7.2% over the past five years, with revenue remaining flat. The company faced challenges due to a large fixed-cost base, which limited its ability to adapt to fluctuating demand.
facts: Labcorp's earnings per share declined by 7.2% over the last five years.
Revenue remained flat at $3.52 billion, missing analyst expectations.
The Early Development segment's revenue grew only 3.3%, prompting potential restructuring.

vendor_negative_news.title: Labcorp posts solid Q3 results but trims full-year revenue forecast
vendor_negative_news.summary: Labcorp's third-quarter results showed an 8.6% increase in overall sales to $3.56 billion, driven by its diagnostics division. However, the company lowered its full-year revenue growth forecast due to underperformance in the Early Development segment.
facts: Labcorp's third-quarter sales rose 8.6% to $3.56 billion.
The Early Development segment's revenue growth was only 3.3%, leading to a revenue forecast reduction.
